description: Add an ao.output.tail MCP tool that returns the last N lines of agent output for a running or recently completed workflow phase. Currently ao.output.monitor uses --stream which is incompatible with MCP request/response. The new tool should: (1) accept a run_id or task_id, (2) read the JSONL event log for that run, (3) return the last N output chunks and thinking events, (4) support filtering by event type (output, error, thinking). This enables real-time visibility into what agents are doing from MCP clients.
title: Add agent output tailing to MCP server
